Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Steven Booska, Esq., via Zoom, Law Office of, (415)397-4345, for Plaintiff.

Monsieur E. Joyce, in person, in propria persona, Defendant

RE: Plaintiff FORDHAM UNIVERSITY's Claim of Exemption.

Ruling - Argued. The court and the parties discuss a withholding amount. Upon conclusion of discussion, the court indicates that a withholding of $100.00 per pay period is sufficient. No objection to the preceding is presented.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)
